description: Removes all plot items from the plot. The plot settings are not changed. If a plot name is not specified, the current view is assumed.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: itasca.command('plot <name> clear') - no direct Python SDK method

keywords.name: s
keywords.description: Plot name. If not specified, the current view is assumed.

examples.description: Remove all items from the current plot

notes: For detailed plot item keywords (color-by, cut, transparency, legend), use pfc_browse_reference("plot-items") to list item types and pfc_browse_reference("plot-items ball") for full syntax.
